justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "after-tomorrow at 10h" as Wednesday, June 3rd at 10:00 AM, and subsequent date and time requests were also correctly understood.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered the same unavailable slots even after the user explicitly stated they couldn't do those days.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made redundant API calls by repeatedly checking for availability on dates the user had already rejected or explicitly stated they couldn't do.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to adapt its suggestions after the user rejected previously offered slots, leading to repeated apologies and a sense of being stuck.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent failed to recover gracefully by continuously offering the same unavailable slots and not expanding its search effectively after the user rejected the initial suggestions.
